subcodes.first_line: To Him be praise and gratitude, to Him be remembrance and glorification and grandeur, and to Him be power and exaltation [3.5s]... ...Blessed is that teacher who remaineth faithful to the Covenant of God, and occupieth himself with the education of children… Whoso is privileged to pay the Right of God will be numbered with such as have observed the ordinances… We send our greetings to the friends and exhort them to conduct themselves with rectitude
subcodes.first_line_orig: له الحمد و المنة و له الذکر و الثنآء و العظمة و له القدرة و الرفعة
subcodes.subjects: @law of Huququ'llah, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @firmness in the Covenant, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @exhortations and counsels, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
